name: A Hallway
description:
The hallway naturally twists so that is seems to head east and down, but
the hallway doesn't seem to be curved or bent in any way.

exits.description: There is a large room to the east.
The hallway continues to the south... er... below.

extra_descriptions.description:
It is dead straight but it goes down and east... M.C.Escher has struck
again!
